welcome_offer.description: Earn 75,000 Wyndham Rewards bonus points after spending $2,000 on purchases in the first 90 days.
notes: P1 adaptor added because Wyndham/Caesars status-match value can make this niche card decision-relevant. Verify issuer page before applying future changes.

caveats: Caveat: Wyndham Rewards award-chart/devaluation changes around 2026-09-30 may reduce redemption value; re-check estimated_value before ranking this card.
